old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.12","title":"Document Meshtastic app compatibility support matrix for R1 MVP","description":"Why this exists: users must understand that LICHEN supports a local Meshtastic app interface but not Meshtastic RF mesh compatibility. What needs to be done: produce the compatibility matrix consumed by project-LICHEN-ev5b.7: supported app discovery/pairing screens, node info/status/config fields, send/receive message flows, unsupported app features, known placeholders, and troubleshooting symptoms. Acceptance criteria: docs match implemented and smoke-tested behavior; unsupported features are explicit; RF non-compatibility is unambiguous; every remaining gap has a Bead.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-06-30T17:15:25.504244Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-06-30T17:15:59.087884Z","labels":["zephyr","meshtastic","docs","compatibility","app-interface","firmware"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.12","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-06-30T17:15:25.504758Z"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.12","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-06-30T17:15:58.389367Z"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.12","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-06-30T17:15:58.568476Z"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.12","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-06-30T17:15:58.743969Z"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.12","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-06-30T17:15:58.916645Z"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.12","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-06-30T17:15:59.087884Z"}]}
